purpose: Record external Sage/GAP/KBMAG/CoxIter artifacts without making the browser responsible for external runtimes.

environment.notes: CoxIter may be installed directly or run through WSL; the devcontainer does not install it.

claims: CoxIter accepted the prepared diagram input for the compact 5-cube example.
The stored output reported cocompact yes and finite covolume yes for the hashed graph.
boundary: This artifact does not certify numerical normal coordinates or chamber basepoints.
This artifact does not certify generated Cayley balls, quotients, or PL Morse/game data.

environment.notes: CoxIter may be installed directly or run through WSL; the devcontainer does not install it.

boundary: This artifact does not certify numerical normal coordinates or chamber basepoints.
This artifact does not certify generated Cayley balls, quotients, or PL Morse/game data.

claims: CoxIter accepted the prepared diagram input for the Emery-Kellerhals P1 double example.
The stored output reported cocompact yes and finite covolume yes for the hashed graph.
boundary: This artifact does not certify exact source transcription or exact normal Gram signature; the in-repo prism-family checker owns those scopes.
This artifact does not certify numerical normal coordinates or chamber basepoints.
This artifact does not certify generated Cayley balls, quotients, or PL Morse/game data.
